title: Delta CPVP Default
description: The pack is specially made for those who want clear ui , low fire,  and small items with clean screen while pvp .
body:
Delta Cpvp Default Pack is designed to keep the classic, “vanilla” look of Minecraft while giving players a competitive edge in PvP-focused gameplay. It makes minimal changes so you still feel like you’re playing with the default style, but it adds subtle tweaks aimed at clarity, speed and visibility during combat.

Key Features:

Shorter swords (so they don’t obstruct your view much during fights). 
Outlined ores — easier to spot valuable resources quickly. 
Lower fire or “low fire” effect — when you’re on fire your vision remains clearer. 
Transparent or clearer water — helps with visibility underwater or spotting enemies near/through water. 
Bow charge indicator / changes in bow appearance for quicker visual cues (when fully drawn).
